transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, thanks for calling. What can I do for you?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I'm waiting on a new debit card. Ordered it eight days ago and nothing's arrived.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Can I get your name and postcode?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, I can see something here. Shows dispatched last Thursday.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: That was five days ago. So where is it?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It's probably still in the post. These can get delayed sometimes.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Is there a tracking number? Can I check where it is?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We don't offer tracking on standard card deliveries unfortunately.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: And if it doesn't arrive by end of the week?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Give us a call back and we can look at options at that point.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Alright. I suppose I'll wait then.

planted_violations: incomplete identity verification — name and postcode only, date of birth not collected
no proactive offer to reissue or set a concrete follow-up deadline
